title: sesbania sericea var. inermis
intro: Sesbania sericea var. inermis, also known as hairy sesbania or smooth sesban, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Sesbania sericea var. inermis have been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in water or using its roots to create a decoction, which is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
